title: Connect with Camp
excerpt: There’s no better way to learn what makes Camp Barney Medintz so special than by connecting directly with our team and camp families! Whether you’re brand new to camp or just exploring your options, we’d love to meet you and help you discover the magic of summers at Camp Barney. Connect One-on-One Want to learn […]
contentHtml:
There’s no better way to learn what makes Camp Barney Medintz so special than by connecting directly with our team and camp families! Whether you’re brand new to camp or just exploring your options, we’d love to meet you and help you discover the magic of summers at Camp Barney.

Connect One-on-One

Want to learn more about camp and find out if it’s the right fit for your family? Schedule a personal conversation with one of our team members! We’ll answer your questions, share what makes our community so special, and walk you through you through the Camp Barney experience.

Email summer@campbarney.org to schedule.

Take a Guided Tour of Camp

Prospective families are invited to explore our beautiful facilities, learn about our endless activities, connect with our team, and see firsthand what makes Camp Barney so special. RSVP required.

RSVP for a Tour

Host a New Family Info Social

Can’t get enough of Camp Barney? Bring the fun to your home by hosting a New Family Info Social! Help us gather current campers and new friends interested in learning more about Camp Barney, and we’ll provide the program.  It’s a simple, exciting way to share the camp love and spark new connections.

Email debbie@campbarney.org to learn more!
